mapper.select: SELECT t.ID, t.THEME_NAME, t.THEME_TYPE, t.OWNER_TYPE, t.OWNER_ID, u.USERNAME AS OWNER_NAME, t.IS_DEFAULT, t.IS_ACTIVE, t.PREVIEW_COVER, t.DESCRIPTION, t.CREATE_TIME, t.UPDATE_TIME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.CREATE_USER) AS CREATE_USERNAME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.UPDATE_USER) AS UPDATE_USERNAME FROM theme t LEFT JOIN user u ON u.ID = t.OWNER_ID WHERE t.ID = #{themeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE theme SET IS_ACTIVE = false WHERE OWNER_TYPE = 'USER' AND THEME_TYPE = #{themeType} AND OWNER_ID = #{ownerId}
UPDATE theme SET IS_ACTIVE = #{status} WHERE ID = #{themeId}
UPDATE theme SET IS_DEFAULT = false WHERE OWNER_TYPE = 'SYSTEM' AND THEME_TYPE = #{themeType}
UPDATE theme SET IS_DEFAULT = #{status} WHERE ID = #{themeId}
UPDATE theme SET OWNER_TYPE = 'SYSTEM', OWNER_ID = null, IS_DEFAULT = false, IS_ACTIVE = false WHERE ID = #{themeId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.ID, t.THEME_NAME, t.THEME_TYPE, t.OWNER_TYPE, t.OWNER_ID, u.USERNAME AS OWNER_NAME, t.IS_DEFAULT, t.IS_ACTIVE, t.PREVIEW_COVER, t.DESCRIPTION, t.CREATE_TIME, t.UPDATE_TIME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.CREATE_USER) AS CREATE_USERNAME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.UPDATE_USER) AS UPDATE_USERNAME FROM theme t LEFT JOIN user u ON u.ID = t.OWNER_ID WHERE t.OWNER_ID = #{ownerId} AND t.THEME_TYPE = #{themeType} AND t.IS_ACTIVE IS TRUE

SELECT t.ID, t.THEME_NAME, t.THEME_TYPE, t.OWNER_TYPE, t.OWNER_ID, u.USERNAME AS OWNER_NAME, t.IS_DEFAULT, t.IS_ACTIVE, t.PREVIEW_COVER, t.DESCRIPTION, t.CREATE_TIME, t.UPDATE_TIME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.CREATE_USER) AS CREATE_USERNAME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = t.UPDATE_USER) AS UPDATE_USERNAME FROM theme t LEFT JOIN user u ON u.ID = t.OWNER_ID WHERE t.THEME_TYPE = #{themeType} AND t.IS_DEFAULT IS TRUE
